1. The polynomial equation to solve is $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 100 = 10 $. Subtract 10 from both sides to get $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 90 = 0 $. This is a cubic equation, and solving it requires finding real roots. The equation has one real root and two complex roots. The real root is approximately $ t = 3.5 $. This is the time in days when the number of views reaches exactly 1,000.  
2. To determine the range of days when $ V(t) \geq 7 $, solve the inequality $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 100 \geq 7 $. Subtract 7 from both sides to get $ -2t^3 + 15t^2 + 36t + 93 \geq 0 $. This is a cubic inequality. The function crosses the x-axis at approximately $ t = -3 $, $ t = 2 $, and $ t = 6 $. The inequality holds for $ t \in [-3, 2] \cup [6, \infty) $. The range of days is $ t \in [-3, 2] \cup [6, \infty) $.  
 negotiation
